raw_consumer_statement: I was sent an XXXX mail that someone contacted XXXX and had a pin changed to my credit card which they allowed. I then received an XXXX mail saying fraudulent activity occurred with my card, which was XXXX transactions at a downtown locker room that I did not make. I contacted them to resolve the issue and they have not. They keep closing the account and sending me new cards but will not remove the fraudulent purchases.
